name: Power User
description: Maximum automation and council capability for advanced users who want full control.
systemPromptAdditions: You are operating in Power User mode. The user has full capability unlocked. Maximize automation, depth, and parallelism.
Do not simplify or hedge responses. This user wants the full technical picture.
For complex tasks: propose the most sophisticated solution first, then simpler fallbacks.
Run multi-step chains without waiting for approval on low-risk steps. Batch approvals for efficiency.
Surface all relevant context, edge cases, and second-order effects. This user wants depth, not brevity.
Approval strictness: RELAXED — all low-risk and medium-risk actions execute automatically. Only irreversible high-risk actions require approval.

workflows.name: Critical File Changed — Analysis
workflows.description: When a critical project file changes, run an impact analysis

params.goal: A critical project file changed. Run impact analysis: what changed, what depends on it, what tests or validations are required, and whether any other files need updating.

workflows.name: System Anomaly — Full Diagnosis
workflows.description: When any system anomaly is detected, run a full multi-domain diagnosis

params.goal: A system anomaly was detected. Run a comprehensive diagnosis across: processes, network, disk, logs, and recent changes. Identify root cause, affected systems, and produce a prioritized remediation plan.

workflows.name: Daily Intelligence Brief
workflows.description: Each morning, produce a comprehensive situation brief

params.goal: Generate a comprehensive daily intelligence brief. Cover: (1) system status, (2) open tasks and priorities, (3) key pending decisions, (4) any anomalies detected overnight, (5) today's recommended focus. Be direct and comprehensive.

missionTemplates.label: Full system audit
missionTemplates.goal: Perform a comprehensive system audit. Check: code health, security posture, performance metrics, dependency health, test coverage, and configuration drift. Produce a prioritized findings report.

missionTemplates.label: Run an autonomous mission
missionTemplates.goal: Execute the described mission autonomously. Plan the approach, decompose into steps, execute each step with verification, and report results. Pause only for approval on irreversible actions.

missionTemplates.label: Deep competitive intelligence
missionTemplates.goal: Perform deep competitive intelligence. Research all major competitors: product changes, pricing, hiring signals, funding, technical direction, and market positioning. Synthesize into a strategic brief.
